class.name: KuwaharaShader
class.brief_description: Multi-pass post-process effect that implements the [b]Anisotropic Kuwahara Filter[/b].
class.description:
Multi-pass post-process effect that implements the [b]Anisotropic Kuwahara Filter[/b]. The passes are: Downsample Pass, Structure Tensor Pass, Horizontal Blur Pass, Vertical Blur Pass, Composite Pass, Upsample Pass. The effect was implemented thanks to [b]Acerola[/b]'s [url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LDhN-JK3U9g]video[/url] on the effect and also thanks to his [url=https://github.com/GarrettGunnell/AcerolaFX/blob/c33f779b093fa1e25faf0c77ef22c3fe6902e2fe/Shaders/AcerolaFX_KuwaharaFilter.fx#L4]GitHub repository[/url] with the implementation.
This effect is the only one within [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b] that contains interchangable (default) presets. The user may also add their own through code/scripting.

method.name: get_preset
method.description: Returns the currently applied preset for the Kuwahara filter.

method.name: set_preset
method.description: Sets a preset for the Kuwahara filter. The default available presets are: FAST, SUBTLE, OIL, ANIME

method.name: set_preset
method.description: Sets a preset for the Kuwahara filter, but with a given configuration. (In this instance, a configuration is a struct containing the variables, which can be made from code/scripting)

method.name: set_preset_as_selected
method.description: Applies the configuration of the current preset enum-index.

method.name: get_preset_configs
method.description: Gets the vector of preset configs, which the user may use to index into.

method.name: add_preset_config
method.description: Adds a KuwaharaPresetConfig to the active array of preset configs.

class.members:
<member name="downsample_factor" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="2"> Controls the amount by which the screen texture is downsampled to improve performance while using the Kuwahara filter.
<member name="radius" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="3.0"> <member name="kernel_size" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="7.0"> <member name="alpha" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="1.0"> <member name="sectors" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="8.0"> <member name="sharpness" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="8.0">
